series_metadata.series_description: This record series references all labels that are attached to blood and urine tubes submitted to the OSHP Crime Laboratory. It also includes all biological samples (blood, urine, oral fluid, etc.) that is submitted to the OSHP Crime Laboratory.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Labels attached to blood and urine tubes and samples are retained for two (2) years from the most recent report date, then burned with the tube. Label and samples may be retained longer if directed by a court order of if required by R.C. 2933,82, Paper: Shred
